creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
--- patch begins here ---
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 398920)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=      node
-PORTVERSION=   4.1.1
+PORTVERSION=   4.1.2
 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=     v
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://nodejs.org/dist/v${PORTVERSION}/
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 398920)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (node-v4.1.1.tar.gz) = 6a610935ff52de713cf2af6a26002322e24fd7933a444436f0817a2b84e15a58
-SIZE (node-v4.1.1.tar.gz) = 22493016
+SHA256 (node-v4.1.2.tar.gz) = febec3703a3fea9b64c46100a7b6a4408250027aa8259a2a815fd2275d502c49
+SIZE (node-v4.1.2.tar.gz) = 22496859
--- patch ends here ---
